refnamediv.refpurpose: in a model, finds the equations where an object is used

listitem.para: * model = a model typed list created by the function create_model
* object = the name of the object to search
* output = the file wherer to save the results (optional; default: the working space)
* nothing: the result is displayed on the screen

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION In a model, finds the equations where an object (endogenous, exogenous, residual, coefficient) can be found.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
